## DeepReadonly type

Recursively readonly view returned for detached content snapshots.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type DeepReadonly<T> = T extends (...args: never[]) => unknown ? T : T extends Date ? ImmutableDate : T extends readonly unknown[] ? {
    readonly [TKey in keyof T]: DeepReadonly<T[TKey]>;
} : T extends object ? {
    readonly [TKey in keyof T]: DeepReadonly<T[TKey]>;
} : T;
```
